titleStmt.title: SII 26.421: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 421. (A.R. No. 400 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the prākāra in the same temple.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulōttuṅgachōḷadēva III: Year 9, Vṛiśchikam (Kārttigai) 24, śu. 7 Sadaiyam = 1186 A.D., November 20.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Puyalvāyttu vaḷam peruga, etc. It mentions the queen Buvaṉamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ.

It records a gift of 5 vēli of land in the kuḍippaṟṟu in Śiṟṟiṉgūr to provide for food-offerings during the attaśāmam (ardhajāmam) and the waking up (paḷḷiyeḻuchchi) services in the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavardēvar of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, by Malaiyamāṉ sūriyan Ṉirēṟṟāṉ Edirikaṇāyaṉ alias Rājarājamalaiyakularāyan of Kiḷiyūr in Tirumuṉaippāḍi-nāḍu. It is stated that from the area where the gift land is situated the lands previously gifted as dēvadāna were exempted, and present gift was given as dēvadāna without removing the tenants cultivating it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyal vāyttu vaḷam perukap poyyātu nāṉ maṟaiyuñ ceyal vāyppat tirumakaḷuñ jeyamakaḷuñ ciṟantu vāḻa veṇ
mati poṟkuṭai viḷaṅka velventaraṭi vaṇaṅki maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉuniti taḻaittoṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkolu
n tikkaṉaittuñ cela naṭappa poṟpamainta muṭi puṉaintu cempoṉ vira- siṁhāsanattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vi
ṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecariparmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 9 viruccikanāyaṟṟu Irupat
tu nālān tiyatiyum pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cataiyattu nāḷ rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkū
ṟṟattu brahmadeyañ ciṟṟiṅkūrāḷuṭaiyār tiruppulippakavartevaṟkku tirumuṉaippāṭināṭṭu kiḷiyūr malaiyamāṉ cūriyaṉireṟṟāṉ Etirikaṇāyaṉāṉa rājarāja
malaiyakularāyaneṉ Ittevaṟkku tiruvattacāmattukkum tiruppaḷḷiyeḻiccikkum tiruvamutupaṭi celvatāka ciṟṟiṅkūr kuṭippaṟṟil viṭṭa nilattukku melpāṟkel
lai tiruppulippakavan vatikkuk kiḻakkuna teṉpāṟkellai kiḻakku nokkip pokiṟa Aimperuṅkālukku vaṭakkum kiḻpāṟkellai Āṭkoṇṭān vatikku meṟkum vaṭapāṟkellai maṇaṅko
namukkālukkum maṉai pattu nālvaṉukkum cerikuṉṟukkum vaṭapuka cukkum teṟkumāka Uṭpaṭṭa viḷai nilattil paḻantevatāṉam nikki Ellai nilamaintu
veliyuṅ kuṭiniṅkāta tevatāṉamākavu maramañcāṭipaṭi kāvalāḷamañciyu maṟṟumeppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷuṅ koḷḷakkaṭavatallātu tarak kalveṭṭivit
teṉ kiḷiyūr malaiyamāṉ cūriyaṉ nireṟṟiṉa Etirikaḷ ṉāyaṉṉāṉa Irājarājamalaiyakularāyaneṉ tittikkuvāṉ vallavaraiyaṉ cantiyyaṉāna Eṟuṅkutirai kaṭakka siṁhāsaṉa
ttukku tan miṇāṭṭiyaik kuṭuppān Ittanmam Iṟakkuvār Itu panmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.421 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
